'''yonawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbriferous|imbriferous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbriferous|imbriferous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yonawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yonawithi|yonawithi]] || [[word:yonawiji|yonawiji]] || [[word:yonawishi|yonawishi]] || [[word:yonawiki|yonawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yonawuthuthu|yonawuthuthu]] || [[word:yonawujuju|yonawujuju]] || [[word:yonawushushu|yonawushushu]] || [[word:yonawukuku|yonawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yonawuthu|yonawuthu]] || [[word:yonawuju|yonawuju]] || [[word:yonawushu|yonawushu]] || [[word:yonawuku|yonawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yonawufthuf|yonawufthuf]] || [[word:yonawufjuf|yonawufjuf]] || [[word:yonawufshuf|yonawufshuf]] || [[word:yonawufkuf|yonawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yonawethe|yonawethe]] || [[word:yonaweje|yonaweje]] || [[word:yonaweshe|yonaweshe]] || [[word:yonaweke|yonaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yonawothotho|yonawothotho]] || [[word:yonawojojo|yonawojojo]] || [[word:yonawoshosho|yonawoshosho]] || [[word:yonawokoko|yonawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yonawotho|yonawotho]] || [[word:yonawojo|yonawojo]] || [[word:yonawosho|yonawosho]] || [[word:yonawoko|yonawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yonawofthof|yonawofthof]] || [[word:yonawofjof|yonawofjof]] || [[word:yonawofshof|yonawofshof]] || [[word:yonawofkof|yonawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfthĂŻf|yonawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfjĂŻf|yonawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfshĂŻf|yonawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfkĂŻf|yonawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|yonawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|yonawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|yonawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|yonawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfthĂŻf|yonawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfjĂŻf|yonawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfshĂŻf|yonawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfkĂŻf|yonawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfthĂŻf|yonawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfjĂŻf|yonawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfshĂŻf|yonawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yonawĂŻfkĂŻf|yonawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yonawĂŠthĂŠ|yonawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yonawĂŠjĂŠ|yonawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yonawĂŠshĂŠ|yonawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yonawĂŠkĂŠ|yonawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yonawathatha|yonawathatha]] || [[word:yonawajaja|yonawajaja]] || [[word:yonawashasha|yonawashasha]] || [[word:yonawakaka|yonawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yonawatha|yonawatha]] || [[word:yonawaja|yonawaja]] || [[word:yonawasha|yonawasha]] || [[word:yonawaka|yonawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yonawafthaf|yonawafthaf]] || [[word:yonawafjaf|yonawafjaf]] || [[word:yonawafshaf|yonawafshaf]] || [[word:yonawafkaf|yonawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yonawasha|yonawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yonawshĂ«sha|yonawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yonawrosha|yonawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yonawmusha|yonawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yonawyasha|yonawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyonawnkshĂ«sha|goyonawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyonawnkrosha|goyonawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyonawnkmusha|goyonawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyonawnkyasha|goyonawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yonanawasha|yonanawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yonanawshĂ«sha|yonanawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yonanawrosha|yonanawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yonanawmusha|yonanawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yonanawyasha|yonanawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyonanawnkshĂ«sha|goyonanawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyonanawnkrosha|goyonanawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyonanawnkmusha|goyonanawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyonanawnkyasha|goyonanawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yenĂŠwasha|yenĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yenĂŠwshĂ«sha|yenĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yenĂŠwrosha|yenĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yenĂŠwmusha|yenĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yenĂŠwyasha|yenĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyenĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|goyenĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyenĂŠwnkrosha|goyenĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyenĂŠwnkmusha|goyenĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyenĂŠwnkyasha|goyenĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yonfawasha|yonfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yonfawshĂ«sha|yonfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yonfawrosha|yonfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yonfawmusha|yonfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yonfawyasha|yonfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyonfawnkshĂ«sha|goyonfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyonfawnkrosha|goyonfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyonfawnkmusha|goyonfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyonfawnkyasha|goyonfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
